task: Prediction-vs-Market Objective Contract + P72A Strategy Decision Gate

lanes.name: Outcome Prediction Accuracy
forbidden_conclusions: model generates profit (accuracy alone does not establish this)
model probability beats implied market probability (requires odds comparison)
lanes.note: P72A operated entirely in this lane. Results are valid for ranking model accuracy. They do NOT establish market edge.

lanes.name: Market Edge Diagnostic
lanes.note: P64–P66 attempted this lane with 2025 CSV odds. Mean edge = -0.032 (negative). Lane blocked for cross-year work. Unblocked only when historical odds API key is available.

lanes.name: Closing Line Value Diagnostic
required_inputs: minimum 1000 games for robust CLV estimate
forbidden_conclusions: bettable edge (unless sample >= 1000 and cross-year validated)
lanes.blocker: No pregame timestamp-separated odds available; single-snapshot CSV only
lanes.note: CLV requires time-series odds (opening → closing). 2025 CSV was a single post-game snapshot. Unblocked only with multi-snapshot historical feed.

lanes.name: Expected Value / Kelly / Bankroll Sizing
forbidden_conclusions: deploy Kelly fractions to real bets (ever, without CEO approval)
claim profitability from theoretical Kelly alone
lanes.blocker: Requires odds + calibrated edge confirmation + CEO deployment approval
lanes.note: P62–P64 computed theoretical Kelly fractions for paper purposes only. kelly_deploy_allowed=False always. P72A AUC/hit-rate results are NOT inputs to this lane.

lanes.name: Production Betting Recommendation
required_gates: GATE_01: prediction accuracy confirmed (AUC >= threshold, n >= threshold)
GATE_03: market edge confirmed (positive mean edge, CI low > 0)
GATE_06: risk controls and bankroll policy approved
GATE_07: monitoring contract active (P52 V2 or successor)
lanes.note: All 8 gates must pass before any production recommendation. P72A passes GATE_01 partially (accuracy confirmed, single 2025 season). GATE_03–GATE_08 remain blocked. No production recommendation is authorized.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: Use as accuracy baseline for all future comparisons
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: Establishes random baseline for hit rate (53.0%) and AUC (0.572).

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: P73A: Tier C deep-dive — sub-tier stability, home/away decomposition, bootstrap CI expansion
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: n=535 with 6/6 monthly stability. Best balance of sample size and confirmed signal. Recommended for operational evaluation if odds ever available.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: P73B: Tier B sample expansion — expand to multi-year data if available; cross-validation
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: Highest AUC (0.646) but n=98 and monthly stability=UNSTABLE. NOT production-ready. Research candidate only until n >= 200 and stability improves.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: Hold watchlist — do not evaluate until n >= 50
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: n=24, SAMPLE_LIMITED. Hit rate 70.8% is statistically unreliable at this sample size. Wide CI [0.500, 0.875] confirms. Do not draw conclusions.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: P73C: Compare raw vs Platt probability quality; evaluate if calibration helps future odds-lane work
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: Platt calibration improves AUC (0.593 vs 0.583 raw) but reduces hit rate (0.566 vs 0.606). Better for probability accuracy; directional picks prefer raw.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: P73A: Include in Tier C deep-dive as home-side sub-analysis
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: Hit rate 67.2% — strongest raw hit rate in the set. Home advantage may partially explain; needs home-bias adjustment for fair comparison.

p72a_strategy_classifications.recommended_next: Deprioritize; investigate why away picks underperform vs home picks
p72a_strategy_classifications.diagnostic_note: Hit rate 53.9% barely above baseline. Away FIP delta advantage is not translating into outcomes at the same rate as home-favored games.

tier_c_operational_candidate.evidence: S01 n=535, AUC=0.583, hit_rate=0.606, stability=STABLE, CI_low=0.565 > 0.530

tier_b_research_candidate.evidence: S02 n=98 >= 75, AUC=0.646 >= 0.62, CI_low=0.535 > 0.50; BUT stability=UNSTABLE
tier_b_research_candidate.caveat: Monthly stability UNSTABLE — research candidate only, not operational

tier_a_watchlist.evidence: S03 n=24 — SAMPLE_LIMITED, CI too wide for conclusions

requires_all_of: market edge confirmed (positive mean edge with CI_low > 0)

p73_recommended_paths.name: Tier C Operational Stability Deep-Dive
p73_recommended_paths.rationale: S01_TIER_C_DIRECTIONAL is the primary operational candidate: n=535, hit_rate=0.606, AUC=0.583, 6/6 monthly stability. Deep-dive should: (1) sub-tier stability by sp_fip_delta band within Tier C, (2) home vs away decomposition, (3) pitcher identity stability, (4) bootstrap CI expansion, (5) year-over-year comparison if 2024 data becomes available.

p73_recommended_paths.name: Tier B Sample Expansion / Cross-Validation
p73_recommended_paths.rationale: S02_TIER_B_DIRECTIONAL has best AUC (0.646) but n=98 and unstable monthly pattern. P73B should: (1) examine individual month volatility causes, (2) attempt multi-year comparison if 2024 data resolves, (3) expand to rolling windows, (4) confirm whether AUC improvement is real or sampling.
p73_recommended_paths.blocker: Low n — may need 2024 data for cross-year validation

p73_recommended_paths.name: Calibration Improvement for Odds-Free Probability
p73_recommended_paths.rationale: S04_TIER_C_PLATT shows AUC=0.593 > raw 0.583, confirming Platt calibration improves probability accuracy. P73C should investigate whether further calibration (isotonic, temperature scaling) improves the prediction-only metrics without requiring odds.

p73_recommended_paths.name: Market-Edge Lane Resume (API Key Required)
p73_recommended_paths.rationale: Market-edge diagnostics (P64–P66 showed -0.032 mean edge) require historical odds. The_Odds_API_KEY must be configured before this path can proceed. 2024 historical odds acquisition is the pre-requisite.

p73_recommended_paths.name: Doubleheader Join Disambiguation
p73_recommended_paths.rationale: Some game_id deduplication issues may affect sample counts. P73E should audit game_id uniqueness, doubleheader handling, and confirm 2025 n=2025 is clean before expansion work.

interpretation_boundary: P72A confirmed the model has directional predictive skill (AUC > 0.50 across tiers). This means the model predicts game outcomes better than chance. It does NOT mean bets on this model produce positive expected value against market odds. Market edge requires: (1) odds data, (2) calibrated probability comparison to implied odds, (3) pregame timing integrity, (4) cross-year validation. None of these have been established for 2025 (P64–P66 showed negative edge -0.032).
